item.title: Patriots Coach Mike Vrabel Seeking Counseling, Will Miss Day 3 of 2026 NFL Draft
item.description: New England Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel is seeking counseling and will not be with the team for Day 3 of the 2026 NFL Draft.

item.title: BetMGM Bonus Code FOXSPORTS: $1500 in Bonus Bets if Your First Bet Loses
item.description: Use BetMGM Bonus Code FOXSPORTS to get up to $1,500 back in Bonus Bets if your first wager loses. Claim your BetMGM welcome offer today.

item.title: 2025-26 NBA Playoff Odds: Spreads, Lines for First-Round Series
item.description: The NBA playoffs are here. Check out the odds for each first-round series.

item.title: Diego Maradona's Heartbreak in Italy '90 Joins Top World Cup Moments List
item.description: The World Cup is defined by memorable moments. Counting down to the top 100 of all-time.

item.title: The New York Mets End 12-Game Skid With Win Over Minnesota Twins
item.description: The New York Mets broke their 12-game losing streak with a win over the Minnesota Twins, but the drama continued.
